RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0001 Page 2 of 3 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV (cont.) Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 660-699 10.96% 10.22% 5.73% 6.01% 12.23% 700-739 11.41% 10.62% 12.26% 10.23% 5.36% LTV high — UW
